scripts.build:next: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" pnpm exec next build
scripts.build:cloudflare: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.deploy:app: pnpm run build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
